label: ORIG APPT REQUEST CHG DT/TM
help_prompt: Enter the date and time the APPOINTMENT REQUEST ON 1010EZ field was modified. It is used to verify that the most recent

label: APPT REQUEST 1010EZ CHG DT/TM
help_prompt: Enter the date and time the APPOINTMENT REQUEST ON 1010EZ field was modified. It is used to verify that the most recent

label: MOST RECENT LOCATION OF CARE
help_prompt: Enter the VA in which care was received most recently.

label: 2ND MOST RECENT DATE OF CARE
help_prompt: Enter the date of care this patient received care in another VA facility.

label: 2ND MOST RECENT LOCATION
help_prompt: Enter the location of care (VA facility) this patient received other care.

label: APPOINTMENT REQUEST ON 1010EZ
help_prompt: Enter 'Y' if the Veteran applicant has requested an appointment with a VA doctor/provider.

label: APPOINTMENT REQUEST STATUS
help_prompt: Enter status of appointment request.

label: APPOINTMENT REQUEST COMMENT
help_prompt: Answer must be 2-200 characters in length.

label: FUGITIVE FELON FLAG
help_prompt: Respond 'YES' if a Fugitive Felon warrent has been received for this patient

label: FFF ENTERED BY
help_prompt: Select the user who is setting the current Fugitive Felon Flag

label: FFF DATE ENTERED
help_prompt: (No range limit on date)

label: FFF REMOVED BY
help_prompt: Select the user who removed the Fugitive Felon Flag

label: FFF DATE REMOVED
help_prompt: Enter the date and time the Fugitive Felon Flag is removed

label: FFF REMOVAL REMARKS
help_prompt: Answer must be 2-80 characters in length.  This is a short comment about clearing this flag.

label: VETERAN (Y/N)?
help_prompt: Is this patient requesting care as a veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces?

label: DATE LAST EICD RUN
help_prompt: Enter the date the last EICD Identification inquiry was run for this patient.

label: VTS PATIENT FLAG
help_prompt: Does this patient want to be in the Veteran Transportation Service (VTS) program?

label: DISCHARGED TO CERNER
help_prompt: Enter date/time patient was discharged when converted to Cerner.

label: INITIAL ODS TREATMENT RECEIVED
help_prompt: Enter the date/time this patient was initially seen for an ODS related treatment.

label: RECALLED TO ACTIVE DUTY
help_prompt: Was this ODS patient recalled to active duty?

label: RANK
help_prompt: Enter the grade/rank of this ODS patient

label: NETWORK IDENTIFIER
help_prompt: Answer must be 1-33 characters in length.

label: MHV REGISTERED
help_prompt: Enter YES if the patient is registered in My HealtheVet, otherwise enter NO.

label: MHV AUTHENTICATED
help_prompt: Enter YES if the patient's My HealtheVet registration has been authenticated, otherwise enter NO.

label: MHV SECURE MESSAGING
help_prompt: If the patient has opted to use secure messaging with their My HealtheVet account, enter YES. Otherwise enter NO.

label: MHVREG UPDATE DATE/TIME
help_prompt: Enter the date/time My HealtheVet registration was confirmed.

label: MHVAUTH UPDATE DATE/TIME
help_prompt: Enter the date/time My HealtheVet registration was authenticated.

label: MHVSM UPDATE DATE/TIME
help_prompt: Enter the date/time the patient opted to use secure messaging with their My HealtheVet account.

label: MHV REGISTER DECLINED TEXT
help_prompt: Enter 2 to 250 characters free text reason the patient declined to register in My HealtheVet.

label: MHV AUTH DECLINED TEXT
help_prompt: Enter 2 to 250 characters free text reason the patient declined to authenticate their My HealtheVet registration.

label: MHV MSG DECLINED TEXT
help_prompt: Enter 2 to 250 characters free text reason the patient declined to use secure messaging with their My HealtheVet account

label: MHV REGISTER DECLINED REASON
help_prompt: Enter the reason the patient declined to register in My HealtheVet.

label: MHV AUTH DECLINED REASON
help_prompt: Enter the reason the patient declined to authenticate their My HealtheVet registration.

label: MHV MSG DECLINED REASON
help_prompt: Enter the reason the patient declined to use secure messaging with their My HealtheVet account.
